top_signals.title: Perpetuals Reports $4.5 Billion in UpsideOnly Volume and Signs Exchange Agreement With Datavault AI for Tokenized Commodities
top_signals.summary: UpsideOnly draws more than 30,000 active users from 185 countries in its first two weeks Perpetuals signs exchange agreement with Datavault AI, bringing tokenized gold, copper, geothermal energy, and critical minerals to 24/7 regulated global trading
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Digital Bank Forbright Seeking to Raise $158 Million in US IPO
top_signals.summary: Forbright Inc., a financial services platform that focuses on middle-market lending and digital consumer banking, is seeking to raise as much as $158 million in an US initial public offering.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tom Lee calls Strategy's bitcoin sale classic bottom behavior
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Sheinbaum Leans on Private Investors to Fix Blackout-Prone Grid
top_signals.summary: Investment in Mexico’s struggling electricity sector is roaring to life as a slew of deals in power plants, renewables and grid upgrades pave the way for President Claudia Sheinbaum’s $56 billion energy plan.

top_signals.title: X-energy Submits Xe-100 HTGR for UK Generic Design Assessment
top_signals.summary: X-energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: XE) (“X-energy” or “the Company”), a leading developer of advanced nuclear reactors and fuel technology, today submitted an application to enter the United Kingdom’s Generic Design Assessment (“GDA”) process for its Xe-100 High Temperature Gas-cooled Reactor (“HTGR”). Subject to acceptance, submission marks a significant milestone in X-energy and Centrica’s efforts to deploy [...]
